title: SeriesResponse
description: Response containing a single time series with metadata and observations.

frequency.description: The frequency of the returned data.

source.description: The original data source (e.g., BLS, BEA, IMF).

geography.description: The geographic area the series covers.

units.description: The unit of measurement for the series values (e.g., Billions of Chained 2017 Dollars, Thousands of Persons, Index).

transformation.description: The transformation applied to the data, if any.

startDate.description: The start date of the returned data range.

endDate.description: The end date of the returned data range.

vintage.description: The vintage date of the returned data.

lastUpdated.description: When the series was last updated in the repository.

isForecast.description: Whether the series contains forecast data from Moody's Analytics models.

data.description: Array of date-value pairs representing the time series observations and/or forecasts.
